purpose: Operational, exact-scope, expiring capability envelope around the frozen TwinWorthinessCertificate.v1 scientific verdict. This is a new operational contract, not an in-place threshold change to the five frozen P1-01 scientific schemas.

minimum_new_evidence.TW-G0: Restore exact source-action shape, dtype, order, value hash, simulator identity, and evaluator identity with no IK, offsets, clipping, suffix, or assistance.
minimum_new_evidence.TW-G1: Provide at least three whole-episode joint, gripper, end-effector, and timing traces with units, frames, availability masks, provenance, and no frozen-threshold regression.
minimum_new_evidence.TW-G2: Provide at least five episodes with measured contact, retention, lift, transport, placement, release, failure-mode, and event-timing evidence; heuristic contact cannot count as measured.
minimum_new_evidence.TW-G3: Provide at least three independently evaluated policy candidates with separately owned simulator rankings and physical or otherwise declared target-domain outcomes meeting concordance thresholds.
minimum_new_evidence.TW-G4: Provide posterior samples, mechanism particles, at least three context groups, and mechanism-specific invariance verdicts meeting the frozen robustness thresholds.
minimum_new_evidence.physical_authority: Provide owner task authority, reviewed gateway preflight, a hash-bound new-related-workcell identity, and the frozen hardware protocol; robot motion additionally requires a reviewed motion-authority digest.
